title: setMessage()
text: setMessage() Specify the message to be sent by the current instance of the UTIMER component. Explain this code operation setMessage params string MsgDestination : IN string MsgId : IN string MsgData : IN endparams Copy Parameters MsgDestination —path to the component instance to which the message will be sent, for example, UREGULARCHECK. MsgId —message ID of the message that will be sent. If left empty, this argument defaults to "Timer". MsgData —message data that will be sent. Return Values The value returned in $status is always 0 . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The setMessage() operation specifies the message to be sent by the UTIMER. This operation must be called when using the UTIMER, otherwise no timer message is sent. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
